name: Stable Diffusion
training_approach: Denoising diffusion in latent space with CLIP text conditioning, trained on LAION-5B dataset
key_innovations: Applied diffusion process in compressed latent space rather than pixel space, dramatically reducing compute
Open-source release enabled an explosion of community fine-tuning and LoRA adaptations
Cross-attention conditioning on CLIP text embeddings for text-to-image generation
ControlNet and other community extensions added precise image control

benchmark_highlights.FID_COCO: Competitive with DALL-E 2 at fraction of compute cost

lineage_path: VAE -> DDPM -> Latent Diffusion -> Stable Diffusion -> SDXL -> SD 3
cultural_impact: Stable Diffusion was the first high-quality open-source image generation model, making AI art accessible to anyone with a consumer GPU. It spawned a massive ecosystem of tools, fine-tunes, and community models on platforms like Civitai and HuggingFace, and ignited heated debates about AI art, copyright, and the future of creative work.
